BNA latest in the past six hours 🚨High-level coordination meeting held in Sar-e-Pul, chaired by Balkh Governor Mullah Mohammad Yusuf Wafa. Governors, police chiefs, & intelligence directors discussed security, law enforcement, countering propaganda, crime, drug trafficking, & boosting inter-agency collaboration in the northwestern zone. 💰 Mawlavi Sayed-ur-Rahim Omar, head of Nuristan mines & petroleum, announced the sale of precious stones including kunzite & magnetite from Mawi mines for 52.6M AFN via tender. 5.2M AFN will be deposited into the Islamic Emirate treasury. 👮Qari Abdul Sattar Halimi, spokesman for Jawzjan police, announced the arrest of two suspects linked to the killing of five family members and wounding of two others in Sheberghan. Incident occurred around noon on Friday when gunmen opened fire inside a home. 🏢 More than 1,000 Afghan refugee families returned home on Friday, with 1,031 families safely transferred to their provinces. Over 890 families received cash aid, 979 registered SIM cards distributed, plus health, food, and awareness support provided. 🏺A one-day book exhibition held by the Culture Dept. at Paktika showcased 200 volumes on religion, society, education & more. Director Abdul Haq Johar emphasized the role of books in youth development & success. Such events inspire reading & intellectual development. 🏅The “Zarghun Watan” volleyball tournament kicks off in Khost, featuring 6 teams, including national players. Supported by local gov’t & private sectors, it’s set to raise Afghanistan’s volleyball to international standards with 10 days of intense competition. 🏗️ A $4.191 million MoU signed between Afghanistan’s Disaster Management Authority & Aga Khan Agency for Habitat aims to bolster disaster risk reduction in Badakhshan, Baghlan, Bamyan & Kabul, including roads, emergency training, avalanche & earthquake preparedness, and public awareness. 🌍 Lebanon and Israel extend ceasefire by 45 days, but Israeli attacks continue despite the agreement. Meanwhile, Iran receives new talks invite from Trump admin, though nuclear program remains the key sticking point. 🤝 President Trump returns from a productive China visit, strong trade ties secured, China interested in U.S. ag products & Boeing planes, united on preventing Iran nuclear weapons, and stabilizing ties. Challenges remain on Taiwan & tech. # باختراژانس Source: Bakhtar News Agency (@bnaenglish) [ https:// x.com/bnaenglish/status/205558 5530536927622 ] # Afghanistan # Israel # Iran # Islam # Trump # Lebanon # Kabul # Badakhshan # Bamyan # Paktika # Jawzjan # Balkh

Germany's domestic intelligence service has faced backlash online after releasing a report that connected several pro-Palestinian symbols and slogans to what it called “secular Palestinian extremism.” In its latest review, the Federal Office for the Protection of the Constitution (BfV) identified a number of images and phrases that it said are linked to extremist narratives within Palestinian activism in Germany. Among the examples cited was the cartoon character Handala, which the report associated with “Palestinian resistance.” The agency also argued that the watermelon symbol depicting the outline of historic Palestine in Palestinian flag colors could be interpreted as rejecting Israel's right to exist. # Israel # Palestine # Gaza # Palestinian

After committing a genocide in Gaza, and war crimes in Lebanon, Yemen, Iran, and Syria, is Netanyahu’s government collapsing ahead of elections? Benjamin Netanyahu’s ruling coalition submitted a proposal to dissolve the Knesset and hold early elections, signaling deepening political turmoil inside "Israel" as pressure mounts over the ongoing wars in Gaza, Lebanon, and Iran. The move comes amid growing anger from ultra-Orthodox parties who are saying that Netanyahu is failing to secure permanent military service exemptions for religious students, threatening the collapse of his coalition government. If approved, the legislation would trigger elections within 90 days, potentially bringing Israeli settlers to the polls by August as Netanyahu faces mounting criticism over the failure to achieve what he called “total victory” against Hamas, Hezbollah, and Iran after more than two years of regional war. Opposition leaders Yair Lapid and Naftali Bennett announced a joint electoral alliance aimed at challenging Netanyahu, while polls suggest the Israeli political scene remains deeply fragmented with no clear governing majority. # Israel # Palestine # Gaza # Genocide # Netanyahu # Syria # Hamas # Iran # Yemen # Lebanon # Hezbollah
